  PsiComment(SINGLE_LINE_COMMENT)('// Basic primary constructor')
  CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(class)('class')
    COMPONENT_NAME
      ID
        PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('Point')
    PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR_TAIL
      FORMAL_PARAMETER_LIST
        PsiElement(()('(')
        NORMAL_FORMAL_PARAMETER
          SIMPLE_FORMAL_PARAMETER
            PsiElement(var)('var')
            TYPE
              SIMPLE_TYPE
                REFERENCE_EXPRESSION
                  ID
                    PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('int')
            COMPONENT_NAME
              ID
                PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('x')
        PsiElement(,)(',')

          SIMPLE_FORMAL_PARAMETER

    COMPONENT_NAME

        PsiElement())(')')
    CLASS_BODY
      PsiElement({)('{')
      CLASS_MEMBERS
        VAR_DECLARATION_LIST
          VAR_ACCESS_DECLARATION
            PsiElement(final)('final')
            TYPE
              SIMPLE_TYPE
                REFERENCE_EXPRESSION
                  ID
                    PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('int')
            COMPONENT_NAME
              ID
                PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('y')
        PsiElement(;)(';')
        THIS_DECLARATION
          PsiElement(this)('this')
          INITIALIZERS
            PsiElement(:)(':')
            SUPER_CALL_OR_FIELD_INITIALIZER
              FIELD_INITIALIZER
                REFERENCE_EXPRESSION
                  ID
                    PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('y')
                PsiElement(=)('=')
                ADDITIVE_EXPRESSION
                  REFERENCE_EXPRESSION
                    ID
                      PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('x')
                  ADDITIVE_OPERATOR
                    PsiElement(+)('+')
                  REFERENCE_EXPRESSION
                    ID
                      PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('delta')
          PsiElement(;)(';')
      PsiElement(})('}')

        PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('F')
    CLASS_BODY
      PsiElement({)('{')
      CLASS_MEMBERS
        NEW_CONSTRUCTOR_DECLARATION
          PsiElement(new)('new')
          FORMAL_PARAMETER_LIST
            PsiElement(()('(')
            NORMAL_FORMAL_PARAMETER
              SIMPLE_FORMAL_PARAMETER

                  SIMPLE_TYPE

          PsiElement(;)(';')
        PsiErrorElement:'new' unexpected
          PsiElement(new)('new')
        METHOD_DECLARATION
          COMPONENT_NAME

              PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('f')

  VAR_DECLARATION_LIST
    VAR_ACCESS_DECLARATION
      PsiElement(const)('const')
      COMPONENT_NAME
        ID
          PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('meta')
    VAR_INIT
      PsiElement(=)('=')
      LITERAL_EXPRESSION

  CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(class)('class')
    COMPONENT_NAME
      ID
        PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('C10')
    CLASS_BODY
      PsiElement({)('{')
      CLASS_MEMBERS

          METADATA

            REFERENCE_EXPRESSION
              ID
                PsiElement(IDENTIFIER)('meta')
          PsiElement(const)('const')
          PsiElement(new)('new')
          FORMAL_PARAMETER_LIST

            NORMAL_FORMAL_PARAMETER
